path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\01. Pollyanna (I Believe in You).mp3
description: It's great, it's beautiful. Nobody knew about this music until this alternative track from the Onett stage. It's a bit cheesy but I love it anyway.
title: Pollyanna (I Believe in You)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\03. Humoresque of a Little Dog.mp3
description: A fun remix of the shop theme from Earthbound. It's pretty good.
title: Humoresque of a Little Dog
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\05. Magicant (for 3DS & Wii U).mp3
description: Gorgeous track, one of my favourites from Yoko Shimomura. I love the choice of synths for the rising melody. It makes it sound so ethereal. Until this stage was revealed I didn't know about the pink Magicant. This music told me, you're going to love Mother 1, Fraser.
title: Magicant
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\04. Magicant.mp3
description: They decided to make a rock remix of this music, and although it does retain some of the Magicant magic, it's nothing compared to Yoko's version.
title: Magicant
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\06. Bein' Friends.mp3
title: Bein' Friends
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\08. Snowman.mp3
description: Beautiful track. It doesn't exactly work for fighting but that's totally fine. I loved how they used it in the Great Maze at the end of Subspace Emissary. This track is in all the Mother games and it's just so melancholic. I love it.
title: Snowman
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\09. Onett Theme & Winters Theme.mp3
description: Finally it's the actual 'Onett' theme! Up until this point the Onett stage has had music from a completely different game (Mother 1). Then shoehorn in another remix of the Snowman theme in here which isn't really necessary but sure.
title: Onett Theme / Winters Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\11. Fourside (Melee).mp3
description: Super fun remix! It's a bit weird and woobly and spooky and I like that about it. It also has a psychedelic weird part which for me represents 'Moonside', the alternate universe of this city.
title: Fourside
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\10. Fourside.mp3
description: What is this horrible dirty guitar sound? It ruins this otherwise excellent song.
title: Fourside
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\12. Smiles and Tears.mp3
description: When I realised that they remixed the credits theme from Earthbound I almost died. I love it so much, they did it so much justice. The only thing it's missing is the 'I missing you' sample.
title: Smiles and Tears
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\13. Mother 3 Love Theme.mp3
description: Love this kinda cheesy track from the opening of Mother 3. I have such fond memories of this game.
title: Mother 3 Love Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

filename: 14. Unfounded Revenge & Smashing Song of Praise.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\14. Unfounded Revenge & Smashing Song of Praise.mp3
description: Awesome track, a mix of two late-game battle themes. Great. Just makes me wish for more!
title: Unfounded Revenge / Smashing Song of Praise
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\15. You Call This a Utopia.mp3
description: It's cool that they did this track for the New Pork City stage. It's perfect because it has Porky's theme in it but all this cute waltz section and then this banjo and harmonica vibe. It's like that in the original song!
title: You Call This a Utopia?!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 12 - EarthBound (Mother) (Wii, 3DS, GC, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2001)\16. Porky's Theme.mp3
description: I never enjoyed this particular track that much even though I love Mother 3. I associate it more with Subspace Emissary.
title: Porky's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 12: EarthBound
